title: SIM Card
content:
This is the first time I'm so happy to see the word **SIM Card**!

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/06/simcard.png)

[seen here](http://www.nytimes.com/2007/06/27/technology/circuits/27pogue.html?_r=1&hp&oref=slogin)

But rumor has it, the phone is locked to AT&T.

Anyway, this week must be the _iPhone_ week. iPhone is everywhere on my feeds.
